misc: Has a habit of getting lost on golf course grounds
Does not spit in the glass
biography: Janne, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, brings his enduring spirit to the greens once again. Representing Revontuli Golf, Janne's participation in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026 marks his ninth appearance in this esteemed tournament. While the coveted Hector Trophée and the Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, Janne's dedication to the sport remains unwavering.

Beyond his golfing endeavors, Janne is known for his disarming generosity, often seen assisting fellow players and sharing his knowledge of the game. Off the course, Janne has a peculiar habit of getting lost on the grounds. Despite his occasional misadventures, Janne's warm personality endears him to all. Further adding to his list of endearing qualities, Janne is known to be a man of impeccable etiquette, never spitting in the glass and always conducting himself with the utmost professionalism.
